user.title: Battery Optimizer Light Huawei
user.description: Configure the Huawei Solar integration entities for Battery Optimizer.

data_description.battery_device_id: Select the Huawei Inverter or Battery device.
data_description.working_mode_entity: The select entity that controls the working mode (e.g., select.inverter_working_mode).
data_description.device_status_entity: Optional: The sensor showing device status (e.g., sensor.inverter_device_status).

data_description.auto_control: If enabled, the integration automatically listens to 'sensor.optimizer_light_action' from Battery Optimizer Light and controls the battery accordingly (Charge, Discharge, Pause, Auto). This eliminates the need for a separate automation.
